result:
リード5件を分析した結果：
- **NGA, H2, Josys, Moneytree**: LinkedInが全て `/company/` 形式（個人アカウント不可）、メールなし → スキップ
- **Sakana AI**: `/company/` LinkedIn + `careers@sakana.ai` → メールチャンネルで下書き

```json
{
  "run_date": "2026-04-04",
  "based_on_lead_run_id": 7,
  "outreach_drafted": 1,
  "outreach_skipped": 4,
  "messages": [
    {
      "company_name": "Sakana AI",
      "channel": "email",
      "recipient_name": "Sakana AI Team",
      "linkedin_url": null,
      "email": "careers@sakana.ai",
      "subject": "Sakana AI × Global Talent from Japan's Top Universities",
      "message_body": "Hi Sakana AI Team,\n\nYour track record of welcoming interns from Stanford, Oxford, and other world-class universities — and building a fully English-first, international research team — caught our attention.\n\nAt JVA, we partner with growth-stage startups like Sakana AI to provide access to motivated international students from Japan's top universities (Waseda, Keio, UTokyo) — on a trial basis with zero recruitment cost. Every student is pre-screened by JVA for both domain knowledge and English proficiency.\n\nHappy to share what this looked like for similar-stage companies. Open to a 15-min call?\n\nBest,\n[Your name]\nJVA",
      "status": "drafted"
    },
    {
      "company_name": "NGA（HelloBoss）",
      "channel": "skipped",

      "email": null,

      "skip_reason": "no_contact_info"
    },
    {
```
